title: Master Accounts
desc: Group accounting desk with a company switcher — operational expenses (all expenses, budget setup, daily/weekly/monthly/custom reports and category + sub-category in ONE section with buttons at the top), chart of accounts, journals, payment schedules, party types, master payroll, full bank desk.
note: Company switcher buttons at the top scope every section (All / Group HQ / each concern); Master Payroll mounts the shared EPAL.payrollDesk per company.
